expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid banding scenarios distinguish styling variants, interactions, and backward-compatible rendering outcomes
expectations.evidence: Explicitly addressed in both execution notes and the QA plan. execution_notes.md: "Case focus explicitly covered: • Styling variants... • Interactions... • Backward-compatible rendering outcomes..." result.md contains dedicated sections: "Banding — styling variants (colors)", "Banding — interactions & rendering outcomes", and a scenario "Backward-compatible rendering outcome vs existing Modern Grid row-only banding behavior".

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md states: "Primary phase under test: phase4a" and "Draft is subcategory-only". result.md is structured as subcategory-only groupings (e.g., "Banding — enablement & placement", "Banding — styling variants (colors)") with nested action steps and observable verification leaves, consistent with the described phase4a contract.
